---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-eyebrow}
ML · Quant · Data Science
:::
# Projects

A collection of end-to-end projects across machine learning, econometrics, and data analysis.
:::

## When Do Model Rankings Hold? An IRT Perspective

<div class="project-categories">
<div class="quarto-category">machine learning</div>
<div class="quarto-category">IRT</div>
<div class="quarto-category">benchmarking</div>
</div>

My thesis explores whether model rankings generalise across benchmarks using Item Response Theory. Motivated by the observation that leaderboard positions often shift dramatically depending on which benchmark is used...

<div class="project-links">

[Blog post](../posts/irt-model-generalization/) · [GitHub](https://github.com/madhavi2104/Evaluating-Model-Generalization-through-Item-Response-Theory.git)

</div>
---
